sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Medium May 2026 Security Advisory Ivanti Secure Access Client CVE-2026-7431 CVE-
id: 0f46f2b3-50e0-502a-932d-a1f1c70e9149
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-8992 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8992
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/13
modified: 2026/06/13
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-8992 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T14:20:20Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-8992", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-8992 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4375417; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

attck_techniques.attack_justification: CVE description confirms exploitation of a public-facing application without authentication

title: SENTINEL APEX — Medium Security Vulnerability CVE-2026-1555
id: 4dafc358-ba93-50ba-8326-aa0a02f40a3c
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-1555 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1555
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/13
modified: 2026/06/13
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-1555 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T14:20:20Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-1555", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-1555 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5747640; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Medium Apostrophe has a Weak Password Recovery Mechanism for Forgotten Password 
id: 94bf600e-0eba-592f-b627-4946b7b59d3b
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-45013 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45013
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/13
modified: 2026/06/13
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-45013 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T14:20:20Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-45013", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-45013 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1002262; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Low Security Vulnerability CVE-2026-50088
id: 3eecfc9d-60bc-5035-8763-fdf4f72eb5ec
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-50088 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50088
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/13
modified: 2026/06/13
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-50088 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T14:20:20Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-50088", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-50088 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2761772; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
apex_ai_summary: [P4] CVE / Vulnerability - low severity (Risk 0.0/10). No MITRE ATT&CK techniques mapped - limited adversarial context. Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: LOW (20%) - limited source data available.
confidence_reason: Single unverified source — low evidence base

sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Low Remote Code Execution CVE-2026-12059
id: 36b02d90-d386-5939-a994-c9203e5cf588
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-12059 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12059
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/13
modified: 2026/06/13
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12059 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T14:20:20Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-12059", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-12059 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9804838; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

title: Fortinet patched a new critical FortiSandbox flaw
description: Fortinet patched a critical FortiSandbox vulnerability that could let unauthenticated attackers remotely execute commands via crafted HTTP requests. Fortinet released security updates to address several vulnerabilities affecting FortiSandbox, FortiOS, FortiProxy, and FortiPortal. The most severe issue, tracked as CVE-2026-25089 (CVSS score of 9.8), is an OS command injection flaw in FortiSandbox products. The vulnerability could […]
